candidates.why: Direct match for total current assets on the balance sheet.
Not current assets; wrong section.
Balancing line, not the reported total.
Non-current balancing line, not current assets.
Direct balance-sheet cash line; preferred over cash-flow beginning/end balances.

candidates.row_label: Cash and cash equivalents at the end of the period/year
candidates.why: Same concept but from cash flow; balance sheet is preferred for CHE.

candidates.row_label: Cash and cash equivalents at the beginning of the period/year
candidates.why: Beginning balance, not period-end balance sheet cash.
Not cash balance.
Not cash balance.
Direct match for total current liabilities.
Balancing line, not the reported total.
Wrong maturity bucket.
Single non-current component, not total current liabilities.
Balancing line, wrong section.
Best clean total for current financing debt; excludes leases because lease liabilities are shown separately.
Captures current maturities of long-term debt but may miss other short-term borrowings if any; less complete than current interest-bearing liabilities.
Semantically ideal, but appears unpopulated; less useful than the populated current interest-bearing liabilities line.

variables.notes: R:c. Selected outside the shortlist because it is a clearer reported total of current debt. Excluded 'Current lease liabilities' per STD rule.

candidates.why: Best available balance-sheet line for taxes payable/current tax liabilities.
Non-current deferred taxes, not taxes payable.
Cash flow item, not balance-sheet payable.

variables.notes: No shortlist candidate was provided; selected the exact balance-sheet label that best matches taxes payable/current tax liabilities.

candidates.why: Best balance-sheet net PPE label available from the candidate list; net PPE is preferred.
PPE-related but gross is less preferred than net.
PPE component on balance sheet, but not clearly total PPE.
PPE-like component, but not explicitly total PPE.

candidates.row_label: Right of Use Tangible Assets - Capital/Finance Lease - Net
candidates.why: Lease right-of-use asset; generally less preferred than owned PPE for PPEGT baseline.

variables.notes: R:c. Chosen the closest reported net PPE line from the shortlist. Manual review recommended because the statement also contains PPE components such as 'Equipment' and 'Owner-occupied properties', so this may not represent total PPE.

candidates.why: Direct match for total assets.

candidates.row_label: Cash flow from operating activities Investing activities
candidates.why: Despite the concatenated label, the values reconcile exactly as operating cash flow total when combined with investing and financing cash flows.

candidates.row_label: Cash Flow from Operating Activities before Changes in Working Capital
candidates.why: Operating cash flow subtotal before working-capital changes, not final OANCF.

final_choice.row_label: Cash flow from operating activities Investing activities

variables.notes: The label appears concatenated, but the values reconcile as net cash flow from operating activities.
